The '''Vacant Valley''' was a point of interest on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]].

Some day, a young guest of the [[Warrick family/Legends|Warrick family]], called [[Norky]], got the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket]], [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]], [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa]] and [[Latara/Legends|Latara]] into trouble. So, the four decided to take an action against Norky: they duped him into following a "treasure" map to the valley by way of Latara's [[Hang-glider/Legends|hang glider]].

But the four young Ewoks went immediately to the Vacant Valley, in order to save Norky, when [[Logray/Legends|Logray]] told them that it was the centurial time of the natural sucking phenomenon in the valley.

{{Nature-stub}}
